name: Alertmanager MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Prometheus Alertmanager — the alert routing and management component of the Prometheus monitoring stack. Enables AI agents to query active alerts, manage silences, inspect alert routing, and interact with Alertmanager's alert deduplication and grouping capabilities for AI-driven SRE workflows.
use_cases: Querying active Prometheus alerts from AI incident response and on-call agents
Managing Alertmanager silences for planned maintenance from DevOps agents
Investigating alert routing and receiver configurations from SRE agents
Integrating Prometheus alerting data into AI-driven operations workflows
not_for: Managed monitoring services (Datadog, PagerDuty) without Prometheus
Real-time metric querying — use Prometheus MCP for that
best_when: A site reliability engineer using Prometheus stack wants AI agents to query active alerts, manage silences, and assist with incident triage and on-call workflows.
avoid_when: You use Datadog, Grafana Cloud, or other managed monitoring. Also: Alertmanager should be paired with Prometheus MCP for full observability.

auth.notes: Alertmanager has no authentication by default. Use a reverse proxy with auth for production. Basic auth supported via proxy.

pricing.notes: Prometheus and Alertmanager are free open source (Apache 2.0). MCP server is free open source.

performance.rate_limits: No rate limits — bounded by Alertmanager instance performance

known_agent_gotchas: Alertmanager has NO built-in authentication — must be protected by reverse proxy in production
Silences created by agents affect real alert routing — test in non-production first
Alertmanager API v2 (OpenAPI spec) — verify API version against your Alertmanager deployment
Alert data contains infrastructure details — treat as sensitive operations data
agent_readiness.security_notes: Alertmanager has no auth by default — MUST use reverse proxy with auth in production. Alert data reveals infrastructure topology. Silence creation affects production alert routing.

security_score_components.security_notes: No native auth — must add via proxy. Alert data is sensitive ops info. Silence creation has production impact.
